title: Nothing But Optimizations
description: No thing but optimizations make you game go  up to 800 Fps faster
body:
Modpack for 1.21-1.21.4 to make minecraft run much faster with a variety of over 40+ mods for people with lower end pc's or for people how just want to have as high Fps as possible


Before NBO
